results.title: Wrong URL Tour (Negative Test)

assertions.description: Tour results are visible on the page
assertions.evidence: [AUTO-CORRECTED: Assertion expects presence but evidence indicates absence] Navigated to a non-existent URL (404 page). Verified that no tour results were displayed, confirming the negative test case passed.

results.agentOutput: Thank you for the detailed summary. It's clear that the "Wrong URL Tour (Negative Test)" was successfully executed, and the system behaved as expected by displaying a 404 page without any tour results. The assertion has also been recorded.
results.validationOutput:
The automated test "Wrong URL Tour (Negative Test)" has been successfully executed.

**Summary:**
1. The browser navigated to the target URL: `https://guidetoiceland.is/this-page-does-not-exist-404`.
2. The page displayed a "404 - Page not found" message, as expected.
3. No tour results were displayed on the page.

This confirms that the negative test case passed, as accessing a non-existent URL correctly resulted in a 404 error with no tour information presented.

I have recorded the assertion with ID 1 and marked it as passed, with the evidence: "Navigated to a non-existent URL (404 page). Verified that no tour results were displayed, confirming the negative test case passed."
